title: Very Simple Gravestones
description: Spawns Graves to store the player's items on death!
body:
### Gravestones!
You may have seen datapacks like this before, but I wanted to put my take on it out there anyway.

Very internally efficient!
</br>Simple, straightforward functionality!
- You die -> Gravestone.
- Gravestone -> Never despawns.
- Click Gravestone -> Get items.
- That's it.

Ambient Commands Per Tick: 0 (in latest version) | 1 (in 1.21.4 and earlier)

Read more on the [PlanetMinecraft Page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/very-simple-gravestones/)
